positive: A highly detailed, intricate illustration of a fantastical, stylized celestial animal, resembling a blend of a griffin, nebula cloud, and majestic manta ray. The central composition should feature the creature soaring dynamically against a minimalist, deep indigo and cosmic purple gradient background. Emphasize strong, flowing silhouettes and glowing bioluminescent elements, giving the print a high-contrast, magical feel. The creature's wings should incorporate nebular dust colors (pinks, cyan, gold) juxtaposed against deep cosmic blues and black void areas. Style: Alphonse Mucha meets modern psychedelic art with clean, graphic linework. Composition: Centered, vertical orientation for strong impact. Lighting: Ethereal backlighting and volumetric glow effect, simulating deep space light sources. Ideal for a high-quality, wearable apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur drawing, cartoonish, cropped, faded colors
